name: Artichoke Spice Bread
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Artichoke hearts; or 1-1/2 cups Pulp
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash currants and allow to drain. Set aside.
2. Drain artichoke hearts and chop in a food processor or blender.
3. Combine the artichoke hearts, sugar, oil, orange juice, and eggs in a mixer. Blend thoroughly.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, nutmeg, cinnamon, cloves, and salt together.
5. Add to artichoke mixture, blending well.
6. Stir in walnuts and currants.
7. Pour into 2 greased 9 x 5-inch loaf pans and bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
8. A greased bundt or tube pan may also be used, baking at 350°F for 1 hour.
